name: Revoke one verifiable credential
description: Edge Agent should be notified when Cloud Agent revokes a credential
descriptionHtml: Edge Agent should be notified when Cloud Agent revokes a credential

testStage.description: Edge Agent should be notified when Cloud Agent revokes a credential

steps.name: Given Cloud Agent is connected to Edge Agent
And Edge Agent has '1' jwt credentials issued by Cloud Agent
Then Edge Agent waits to receive the revocation notifications from Cloud Agent
And Edge Agent should see the credentials were revoked by Cloud Agent
